title: Stipa brauneri
intro: Stipa brauneri, also known as Braun's oatgrass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including gastrointestinal problems, respiratory infections, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Stipa brauneri include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Stipa brauneri is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used to alleviate coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
